docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MUNOZ, FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, LELAMAE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-17-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
